mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sqlserver_diagnostic_event (instance_id,event_type,database_name,severity,fingerprint,payload,sensitive_redacted,event_time) VALUES
(#{instanceId},#{it.eventType},#{it.databaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.severity}, #{it.fingerprint},#{it.payload},#{it.sensitiveRedacted},to_timestamp(#{it.eventTimeMillis}/1000.0))
ON CONFLICT (instance_id,event_type,fingerprint) DO NOTHING
